reads: A FRESH vLLM engine on a DIFFERENT GPU loaded the target's KV from the durable on-disk content-addressed CAS written by a SIGKILLed worker (warm_num_cached_tokens ~= ctx, cold ~= 0 => a real cross-process hit into attention). Net TTFT speedup is context-dependent (KV-restore beats reprefill only at long contexts; cf Gate-1b 1.8x@4K -> 17x@32K); at short ctx the disk read can cost more than recompute.
